name: Gotham City (Open RPG)
description:
Gotham. A city full of mystery.

Night descends, the urban landscape transforms into a realm of foreboding shadows and flickering neon. The sun vanishes behind steel and glass, surrendering the city to the eerie glow of malfunctioning streetlamps and storm-heavy skies. Citizens hurry through the streets, instinctively wary of what darkness awakens. From the decaying harbor to the towering Wayne Tower, an uneasy stillness spreads across districts rich and poor. In the distance, Arkham Asylum broods silently, while Crime Alley sinks into deliberate blackness. Then, as the final light dies, the Bat-Signal ignites cutting through the gloom with a silent promise: hope, or warning. The city waits, suspended on the edge of what the night will bring.

---

This is open ended story where you, the reader, can place itself in. You are free to do whatever you want. The limit is your imagination.

---

I do not control the AI. If it acts off contact the site or check their Discord.
